coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 2-group, 24-node closure.
validation: The authored fixed five-way pipe icon has exact topology and bit-for-bit matching local bounds. Blender reports all source faces smooth, no sharp edges, and one corner-normal value per point, which the GN-VM point normals preserve. The default browser display now evaluates Blender 5.1's bundled studio.sl light directions, colors, wrapped diffuse response, roughness 0.4, and specular response. Against the saved Workbench view it reaches 0.9971 silhouette IoU and 0.6636 macro luminance correlation; against a Blender studio-light-only diagnostic it reaches 0.7655. Workbench cavity and screen-space shadows remain the documented visual residual. Cylinder.006 was audited alongside it and intentionally evaluates to empty geometry in both Blender and GN-VM; it is an attribute/material helper rather than a gallery generator.
